calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Oct-29-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Howard Olsen, Esq. 415-931-4207 of the Law Office of Michael Heath for Defendant Michael S. Davidson aka Michael who is also present.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Discussed. Hearing is held. Counsel informs the Court Plaintiff submits on the pleadings. Defendant informs the Court he cannot pay anything. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION of Michael S. Davidson aka Michael.

Upheld/Granted.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR#6185, tonyvaughn@yahoo.com, Reported. =(302/HK)
